ide.description: IDE environment. Auto-detected via the VS Code extension; only override if needed. Currently only 'vscode' is supported.

prefer.description: Preferred AI tool to dispatch to. Must be one of the supported tool names. If omitted, the first key in 'providers' is used, or 'github-copilot' as the final fallback.

hotKeys.description: Modifier keys to hold while clicking an element to activate the inspector. Set to false to disable hotkey activation entirely.

includeSnippet.description: Whether to inject the raw code snippet into the prompt. Default is false (saves tokens, lets IDE AI read the file directly).

providers.description: Per-tool configuration. Keys must be valid tool names. All fields are optional — omit 'type' to let the system auto-select the best mode (Plugin → CLI → Clipboard).

type.description: Force a specific interaction mode. Omit to let the system auto-select. Setting this disables automatic fallback to other modes.

autoSend.description: If true, the prompt is submitted immediately after injection. If false (default), the prompt is pasted into the input box for the user to review before sending.

bin.description: CLI executable name (resolved from PATH) or absolute path. CLI mode only.

args.description: Extra arguments passed to the CLI on startup. CLI mode only. Supports variable substitution: ${workspaceRoot}, ${file}, ${relativeFile}, ${fileDirname}.

cwd.description: Working directory for the CLI process. CLI mode only. Defaults to ${workspaceRoot}. Supports variable substitution.

coldStartDelay.description: Milliseconds to wait for the CLI REPL to initialize on first launch. CLI mode only.
